rationale.metrics: All critical metrics are meeting or exceeding targets. Activation conversion rate, error rate, payment success rate, support ticket volume, DAU/WAU ratio, API latency, and feature adoption funnel completion are all performing well.
rationale.feedback: User sentiment is overwhelmingly positive with no negative feedback reported.
rationale.technical: Technical risks are manageable with mitigation plans in place. Enhanced monitoring, a prepared rollback plan, and additional safeguards like circuit breakers will be implemented.
rationale.business: The overall business impact is positive and sustainable. The positive user sentiment and trend data indicate a successful launch.

risk_register.risk: Single points of failure in the recommendations API and shared CPU cluster
risk_register.mitigation: Implement circuit breakers and plan for dedicated resources in future releases

risk_register.risk: Infrastructure scaling limitations beyond tested traffic levels
risk_register.mitigation: Continuous monitoring and preparation for rapid response
Enhanced monitoring for early detection of degradation

risk_register.risk: Hidden technical debt and architectural constraints
risk_register.mitigation: Prioritize fixes in the next release

action_plan.action: Implement enhanced monitoring for key metrics
Prepare and test a rollback plan
action_plan.success_criteria: Rollback plan documented and successfully tested

action_plan.action: Establish a direct user feedback loop
action_plan.success_criteria: Feedback channel operational and receiving user inputs

action_plan.action: Ensure cross-functional collaboration for issue resolution
action_plan.success_criteria: Regular meetings and communication channels established

communication_plan.internal: Share positive launch feedback with the team to boost morale. Keep the team informed of monitoring results and any emerging issues.
communication_plan.external: Continue engaging users through positive feedback channels. Monitor social media and public forums for any shifts in sentiment.
communication_plan.timeline: Ongoing, with regular updates as needed

confidence_improvement: Continuous monitoring data, user feedback, and issue resolution progress would increase confidence.
escalation_triggers: Decrease in payment success rate below threshold
Sudden spike in support ticket volume
Negative user feedback or system failures reported
